title: Bath Toys for Kids, Baby Wind Up Bath Toys, Swimming Water Floating Turtle Penguin Clockwork Bathtub Pool Toy Game for Kids Boys Girls Toddlers Baby Bath Time
features: 🐢 🐧【safe for children】 - Made of high quality eco-friendly plastic material, non-toxic, safe and durable and will not color fading. It has a smooth surface with round edge design and no small parts will provide maximum security for your kids.

🐢 🐧【Adorable Bath Toys】- Bright colors and cute appearance turtle and penguin design will easily grab your kids attention, fun bath toy to entice your child into taking baths. The suitable size is good for little hands.

🐢 🐧【Happy Baby Bath Time】- Clockwork driven! No batteries required. Twist clockwise the grip under the toy and then release it and the turtle or penguin will swim quickly in the water around your kids. Wind up floating bath toys will allow your little ones to have a fun bathing time!

🐢 🐧【Parent-Child Interaction】BelleStyle baby bath toys set is an excellent gift to enhance relationship between parents and children. It is nice gift for toddlers and babies to have endless fun in bath time and make your family full with happiness.

🐢 🐧【Early Educational Toys】- The bright colors help to train children's ability to distinguish colors, develop their hand-eye coordination, dexterity and motor skill. Perfect gift for Christmas, birthday and holiday for boys and girls.
description: Product Description Are you worry about that baby resists bathing and crying in the bath? Now, let's make the little one loves bath time. Choose BelleStyle Bath Toys Set and give your child having a happy bath, live up to the good times. Perfect Size, Designed for Little Hands. Place to use: Bathroom, Bathtub, swimming pool, beach Inspire Learning & Imagination. A fun bath toy to get children indulged in bathing time. Let Kids Love Bathing! Cute designs will draw kids' attention. Help children understand the of physical buoyancy and develop their hand-eye coordination. No Batteries Required Clockwork driven. Easy to use, twist the grip under the toy and release it in the water. Safe for Kids Made of 100% safe material and Non-toxic ABS plastic. Smooth surface without any sharp edge. Drain and Keep Dry Water come out from the hand of turtle to keep bath toy inside dry and avoid mold. Package Included: 2 * Bathing Penguins 2 * Bathing Turtles Notice: Children under 3 years old should play under adult supervision.
